title: jepsonia parryi
intro: Jepsonia parryi, also known as Parry's jepsonia or Parry's twinflower, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Stemonuraceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Jepsonia parryi include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Jepsonia parryi often involve infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, which can be used to treat various ailments or as a natural remedy for stress relief.
